result:
The task has been successfully completed. The cleaned and harmonized dataset has been written to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The file contains the following variables:
- NSID (cohort member identifier)
- incwhh14 (banded household income at age 14)
- incwhh15 (banded household income at age 15)
- incwhhcnt14 (continuous household income at age 14)
- incwhhcnt15 (continuous household income at age 15)
- incwhh16 (banded household income at age 16)
- incwhh17 (banded household income at age 17)

All variables have been standardized with appropriate missing value codes and factor levels as specified in the requirements.
